location: Random (~4%) drop from Kaiden Sellsword enemies. Farmable from a camp of sellswords (some on horseback) northeast of the Agheel Lake North grace, a pair stationed due west of Warmaster's Shack, and a camp southwest of the Murkwater Coast area.
tactics: Best farm spot is the sellsword camp northeast of Agheel Lake North — several Sellswords patrol here, some mounted
Sellswords hit hard in groups; pull them individually or use Torrent to kite the mounted ones away from the pack
Only some Sellswords carry the Dismounter — check the weapon on their back, and rest at a grace to respawn the camp for repeat attempts
The same enemy type (and drop) also appears later on the road through Mountaintops of the Giants if you'd rather farm it there at a higher level
lore: A curved greatsword favored by the burly mercenaries of Kaiden, fusing a scimitar's sweeping edge with the heft of a hand axe. Simple and brutal, it's said to swing just as effectively from horseback as on foot.

builds.name: Quality STR/DEX
builds.why: Even D/D scaling split between Strength and Dexterity fits a balanced Quality-affinity build
